settings.text:
To know Yoé is to love it. We’re thrilled you want to invite your Valentine to experience Yoé and enter a new era of elevated clean beauty.

Complete these simple questions and on Valentine’s Day, your loved one will receive an email containing a voucher to choose their favorite Yoé product.
Complete these simple questions and we’ll send them a full-size Yoé product, on us!

custom_css: h5 {font-size: 1.3rem; text-align: center; font-weight: 350 !important; line-height: 1.4; margin-bottom: 1rem;}

settings.custom_liquid:
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
    setTimeout(function () {
        let hashValue = window.location.hash.substring(1);
        let extractedId = hashValue.match(/^\d+/);

        if (extractedId) {
            let orderId = extractedId[0];
            let inputField = document.getElementById("Order_ID_01JJWAQ4C9KYMWKTF644DZTANN");
            if (inputField) {
                inputField.value = orderId;
                inputField.disabled = true;
            }
        }
    }, 3000);
});


</script>

<style>
#Order_ID_01JJWAQY9S3K2QJ46DYPGYBB3T, #label-Order_ID_01JJWAQY9S3K2QJ46DYPGYBB3T{
display: none!important;
}
